Chatroom.kaomoji.doesNotExist.tips: This kaomoji pack does not exist. Please re-enter or type |help to view parameters.

Command.desc.mainCommand: Display commands related to [Xiao Su's Activity Module].
Command.desc.help: Display commands related to [Xiao Su's Activity Module].
Command.desc.export: Export chat logs from the current chatroom. Enter: '/xsa export -h' to view usage.
Command.desc.v: Display version information for [Xiao Su's Activity Module].
Command.desc.new: Display the latest update log for [Xiao Su's Activity Module].
Command.desc.act: Display the full list of actions added by [Xiao Su's Activity Module].
Command.desc.jieba: Display command help for the automatic stutter effect.
Command.desc.chess: Start a chess match! Who will challenge? (Enter /xsa chess -h to view help)
Command.help.export:
Enter: '/xsa export -[time]' to export chat logs within a specific time range.
Example: '/xsa export -05:34-20:40' (seconds allowed)
By default, exports all chat logs in the current chatroom.
Note!
Command.help.jieba: Messages starting with ``spacespace` will be sent with a stuttering effect. There are two ways stuttering is applied: If two spaces are entered, stuttering may occur at that position. If one space is entered, the word segmentation system is used. An optional parameter exists: If the message starts with ``[1-9]`, the number indicates stutter intensity (default 3). Higher means more stuttering. Example without parameter: ` [words to say] Possible output: " words...-to-the... words... " Example with parameter: `3 [words to say] The 3 indicates stutter level, meaning each space has a 30% chance to stutter. If the number is followed by m, moaning sounds will be added based on current arousal.
Command.help.kaomoji: Enter |+parameter, or click the small button under the chat input to open the kaomoji panel. Left-click: insert into input box; Right-click: send as an action message; Middle-click: send as a normal message. Available parameters: help Show all parameters. all Show all kaomoji. hp Happy kaomoji. sd Sad kaomoji. sy Shy kaomoji. ar Angry kaomoji. sp Surprised kaomoji. cf Confused kaomoji. nt Playful kaomoji.
Command.help.chess:
Use /xsa chess to start a match. Other players cannot see the board initially.
Once a tile is selected and the send button is clicked, others will see the board.
Any player in the chatroom can select a tile. When any player clicks send, the game begins.
The first sender can play against multiple players simultaneously.
Players may adjust their own pieces before sending, but not their opponent's.
This plugin does not provide win detection for Gomoku or Go.
Captured stones in Go must be manually removed.

After sending, the board will disappear after 30 seconds.
Other players will still see the board state.
Only players with the plugin installed can play and view the game.
Command.desc.version: Xiao Su's Activity Module version number

Data.TIPS_FOR_LOADING_OLDER_VERSIONS:
Xiao Su's activity expansion:
You have loaded an older version.
Something must have gone wrong.
This usually does not happen if the mod is loaded normally.
